title: Rock Paper Scissors
description: Simple game that everybody knows brought into the Minecraft.
body:
![log](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e100696ce8bf45ad9670b807519da20d301aacf7.png)

**NO LONGER SUPPORTED**

# What is Rock Paper Scissors?
Simple game that everybody knows brought into the Minecraft. Thanks to the competition between players, the gameplay will never be boring. Players can test their skills in predicting their opponent's moves and compete for server currency, which adds excitement to each duel.

![pov1](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/133428532/353954305-4ea9db33-73fe-4d22-89c6-d94f742c68b5.gif?jwt=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3MjI4MDQ5NDIsIm5iZiI6MTcyMjgwNDY0MiwicGF0aCI6Ii8xMzM0Mjg1MzIvMzUzOTU0MzA1LTRlYTlkYjMzLTczZmUtNGQyMi04OWM2LWQ5NGY3NDJjNjhiNS5naWY_.ICFw0B-OULzmK-x9a1afujr3Ar1fq6zFL2ZXOciGZfM) ![pov2](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/133428532/353954313-f7e0127a-21f0-45f2-9fbc-34ed9ccc37d0.gif?jwt=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3MjI4MDQ5NDIsIm5iZiI6MTcyMjgwNDY0MiwicGF0aCI6Ii8xMzM0Mjg1MzIvMzUzOTU0MzEzLWY3ZTAxMjdhLTIxZjAtNDVmMi05ZmJjLTM0ZWQ5Y2NjMzdkMC5naWY_.GZZpYzmbP8GYq0NuhQwfSyD3rFDmEN_drLSWPk8FNdk)


![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a6af30730e1555fee4ffee08eb1dc4eb5f017de.png)

- Bets * The ability to play for currency available on the server.
- Simple and intuitive operation * A user-friendly interface that is easy to learn and use.
- PvP gameplay * Players can challenge each other to a rock-paper-scissors duel.
- Invitation system * Flexible system with expiration time.
- Custom message formating * Plugin uses [MineDown](https://github.com/Phoenix616/MineDown) which allows you to use the full RGB palette and more.

![commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b52797d3795d9b0633004085a24ac52f77b750d1.png)

- /rps game <player> <bet> * sends request to play rock-paper-scissors
- /rps accept <player> * accepts game request
- /rps toggle * toggle the ability to send invitations to you (after restarting the server, disable it for everyone)
- /rpsreload * reloads config (rps.admin permission required)

### Plugin require Vault to work!
-
(plugin should works on minecraft 1.16-1.21
but its tested only on 1.18-1.21)
-
